items.blinded_text:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Entity A in degrees Celsius on 17 May '26. The resolution source for this market will be information from Entity B, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Entity A once information is finalized, available here: https://www.Entity B.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI. To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C. This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized. The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market. Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.
https://www.Entity B.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI

question: Will the lowest temperature in City A be 14°C on relative-date-1 ?
